title: Empty or corrupt config JSON files crash Initialize-PipelineRegistry and Get-PipelineItems
description: When config/cron-aiathon-pipeline.json was empty, whitespace-only, or contained invalid JSON, ConvertFrom-Json returned $null which cascaded into null-ref errors throughout the pipeline module. Get-CentralMasterToDo also crashed when checking properties on $null objects under StrictMode.
detection_method: Runtime testing with empty and corrupted config files

fix_applied.description: Added null/empty content guards in Initialize-PipelineRegistry and Get-PipelineItems. Used PSObject.Properties check for safe property access under StrictMode in Get-CentralMasterToDo. Fall back to empty array when config is unreadable.
fix_applied.pattern: Guard ConvertFrom-Json with content emptiness check; use PSObject.Properties for StrictMode-safe property access
